source: Representative sample shaped like the arXiv Atom API (demo entries)

papers.title: Atmospheric characterisation of temperate sub-Neptunes with JWST transmission spectroscopy
papers.summary: We present a homogeneous re-analysis of JWST NIRSpec transmission spectra for six temperate sub-Neptunes, constraining metallicity and aerosol coverage with a hierarchical retrieval framework.

papers.title: Self-calibrating photometric pipelines for small-aperture transit surveys
papers.summary: A fully self-calibrating differential photometry pipeline that models systematics jointly across the field, improving transit depth precision by 30% for ground-based small telescopes.

papers.title: Emergent world models in sparse mixture-of-experts transformers
papers.summary: We probe sparse MoE language models for internal spatial and physical representations and find expert-specialised world-model circuits that emerge at scale.

papers.title: Gaia DR4 kinematics of the Radcliffe Wave: evidence for a damped oscillation
papers.summary: Using Gaia DR4 proper motions of young stellar clusters, we measure the vertical oscillation of the Radcliffe Wave and estimate its damping timescale.

papers.title: PID-free thermal control of compact spectrographs using model-predictive learning
papers.summary: A learned model-predictive controller stabilises spectrograph temperature drift to sub-millikelvin levels, outperforming tuned PID baselines in radial-velocity stability.
